text_block_list.text:
I head up to the rooftop for some<n>fresh air and find
Gold Ship and<n>Grass Wonder standing there.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No... I'm still lacking something I need<n>as Uma
Lord! I must go on a voyage<n>to find the missing
piece!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A voyage does sounds lovely, buuut...<n>not today, I
think.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Everyone promised to have a race at<n>the training
track, remember?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ah, of course. You mean to say that<n>"time is of the
essence," yes?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But do your best! And even if you<n>miss me, shed
no tears! For we shall<n>meet again someday!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Honestly, that Golshi. I'd better<n>get a move
on and bring her back.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, that would be very kind of you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In that case, bring her back here if<n>you find her. I
appreciate the help.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Golshi's set off on a voyage?!<n>Rayos! But what
about today's<n>race?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We must locate and capture la<n>fugitiva! She's not
getting away on<n>my watch!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Golshi's on a voyage?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I bet she's trying to run away from<n>racing me! I'll
find her if it's the last<n>thing I do!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nah, haven't seen her. Come to think<n>of it, didn't
everyone promise to race<n>today?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okie-dokie. You betcha. I'll look for<n>her on my way
back to the academy.

I search high and low for Gold Ship,<n>but with no
sign of her, I return to the<n>rooftop to find...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehehehe... Someday, this whole<n>world will belong
to Uma Lord Golshi!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We finally found ya!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! Do you have any idea how long<n>we've been
looking for you?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! So this is where you were. No<n>wonder we
couldn't find you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew... Great work, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Guess ya found me... Heh. I s'pose<n>they do say
that a criminal always<n>returns to the scene o' the
crime.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching y'all from up<n>here on my
perch.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And it's helped me realize what I,<n>Uma Lord
Golshi, have been<n>missing—what I really need.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Four Umamusume have come here in<n>search of
yours truly... I assume you<n>know what I'm getting
at, right?

Gold Ship's face is absolutely<n>serious as she
waits for an answer.

The Uma Lord and four Umamusume.<n>Hearing that,
the first thing that comes<n>to mind is...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I knew you had it in you, dear<n>Watson! You should
be part of the<n>Four—wait, it's the Four Paladins,
not<n>the More-Than-Four Paladins!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Tell ya what, then—you be the hero!<n>And if you
beat me, I'll give you half<n>the world!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No more talking! To battle! C'mon!<n>Gimme yer
best shot!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But you've gotta battle us first!<n>GOTCHA!

El Condor Pasa and King Halo grab<n>Gold Ship by
the arms and drag her<n>away.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! And now you get whisked<n>away like a
cow caught in a tractor<n>beam.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Why don't we build<n>castles for the
Four Paladins in<n>space?! We can fill them with
booby<n>traps!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we all go running together<n>first? That
way we can strengthen the<n>bonds of the Four
Paladins too.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... Just don't cause anytrouble, okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I want a wrestling ring in my castillo!<n>And make
sure my doorbell's a<n>gong!

The Uma Lord may be chaos<n>incarnate, but she
appears to have a<n>good relationship with the Four
Paladins nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's right! In service of Uma Lord<n>Golshi are the
unstoppable Four<n>Paladins!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
El the Habanero! Sky the Fisher-uma!<n>Grass the
Beast! The other one!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why am I just the "other one"?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna give me a ring name,<n>then I want
something cooler, por<n>favor!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I think I'm fine with mine. That<n>title sounds
like permission to sit back<n>and do some angling.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Dear me... It looks like I may be the<n>only one with
a moniker fit for<n>fighting.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We've got the Uma Lord and the Four<n>Paladins, so
now we need a hero.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'll also need someone to tearfully<n>betray the
heroes, and a despicable<n>advisor who's trying to
take over the<n>country!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Geez, there really is no rest for the<n>Uma Lord!

And so, having found her Four<n>Paladins, the Uma
Lord's journey<n>continues.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You buffoon! There's only one thing<n>that could
bring so many unique<n>individuals together—and
that's hot<n>pot! Imagine us, a right old gaggle of
witches, workin' our dark magic<n>'round the
cauldron!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't look for reason or logic in<n>anything this one
says or does...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've got the munchies somethin'<n>fierce now, but I
haven't got a<n>cauldron... What about a clay pot?
We<n>can at least scrape together some<n>clay, right?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You guys, go out hunting for<n>ingredients! Get us
some edible stuff,<n>some inedible stuff, whatever
tickles<n>your fancy!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm heading out to find some clay for<n>the pot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Guess I'll do some fishing, then...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Wait! It's still too early for dinner. We<n>should
really prepare for the race<n>first.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Absolutamente! I'm hankering for hot<n>pot too, but
I've been really looking<n>forward to this race!

In the end, Gold Ship gets dragged<n>away by her
friends...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hot pooooot! Hey, you there! Get that<n>hot pot
ready! Make sure there's<n>enough to feed all of
us!

She does as she pleases, going<n>wherever the
wind takes her, without<n>a care in the world.

And that's probably where Gold<n>Ship's charm
lies.
